title: Sodium Holo API
description: An innovative library for creating high-performance holograms for rendering various scenes and replacing millions of blocks without lag!
body:
**SHA (Seamless Holographic Architecture / API)** is a high-performance technical core and framework for Minecraft (Fabric), designed for rendering seamless portals, complex physics, and virtual structures.

**Key Features:**
1. **Holograms & Rendering (VirtualStructures):** An offline rendering system for massive world regions, utilizing off-heap memory and VBO pipelines to ensure zero performance overhead.
2. **Advanced Collision (RapierEngine):** Native integration with the Rapier physics engine (Rust) to calculate incredibly complex hitboxes and AABB collisions, bypassing vanilla Minecraft limitations.
3. **Seamless Transitions:** Complete entity state control during world-hopping and teleportations (suffocation prevention, fake collisions, visual projections).

In short: **SHA is a next-generation modding foundation combining blazing-fast hologram rendering with custom physics and multi-dimensional portal capabilities.**
